exports.DeviationExportService = void 0;
const common_1 = require("@nestjs/common");
const ExcelJS = require("exceljs");
const prisma_service_1 = require("../../../prisma/prisma.service");
const format_util_1 = require("../../../shared/utils/format.util");
const excel_util_1 = require("../../../shared/utils/excel.util");
const COMMON_STATUS_MAP = {
    draft: '草稿',
    pending: '待处理',
    pending_review: '待审核',
    pending_approval: '待审批',
    approved: '已批准',
    rejected: '已拒绝',
    completed: '已完成',
    cancelled: '已取消',
    active: '启用',
    inactive: '禁用',
};
const DEVIATION_FIELDS = [
    { key: 'fieldName', label: '字段名称', width: 20 },
    { key: 'expectedValue', label: '期望值', width: 15 },
    { key: 'actualValue', label: '实际值', width: 15 },
    { key: 'deviationAmount', label: '偏离量', width: 15 },
    { key: 'deviationRate', label: '偏离率', width: 15 },
    { key: 'deviationType', label: '偏离类型', width: 15 },
    { key: 'reason', label: '原因', width: 30 },
    { key: 'status', label: '状态', width: 15 },
    { key: 'reportedAt', label: '上报时间', width: 20 },
];
let DeviationExportService = class DeviationExportService {
    constructor(prisma) {
        this.prisma = prisma;
    }
    async exportDeviationReports(dto, user) {
        const where = this.buildDeviationWhere(dto);
        if (user) {
            if (user.roleCode === 'user') {
                where.creatorId = user.id;
            }
            else if (user.roleCode === 'leader') {
                where.creator = { departmentId: user.departmentId };
            }
        }
        const fields = (0, excel_util_1.getFilteredFields)(DEVIATION_FIELDS, dto.fields);
        const total = await this.prisma.deviationReport.count({ where });
        const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
        const worksheet = workbook.addWorksheet('偏离报告');
        (0, excel_util_1.setupWorksheet)(worksheet, fields);
        await this.fillDeviations(worksheet, where, total, fields);
        return Buffer.from(await workbook.xlsx.writeBuffer());
    }
    async fillDeviations(worksheet, where, total, fields) {
        const pageSize = 1000;
        let page = 0;
        while (page * pageSize < total) {
            const reports = await this.prisma.deviationReport.findMany({
                where,
                skip: page * pageSize,
                take: pageSize,
                orderBy: { reportedAt: 'desc' },
            });
            reports.forEach((report) => {
                const row = this.mapDeviationRow(report);
                worksheet.addRow((0, excel_util_1.filterRow)(row, fields));
            });
            page++;
        }
    }
    mapDeviationRow(report) {
        return {
            fieldName: report.fieldName,
            expectedValue: report.expectedValue,
            actualValue: report.actualValue,
            deviationAmount: report.deviationAmount,
            deviationRate: `${(report.deviationRate * 100).toFixed(2)}%`,
            deviationType: this.formatDeviationType(report.deviationType),
            reason: report.reason,
            status: (0, format_util_1.formatStatus)(report.status, COMMON_STATUS_MAP),
            reportedAt: (0, format_util_1.formatDate)(report.reportedAt),
        };
    }
    buildDeviationWhere(dto) {
        const where = { deletedAt: null };
        if (dto.status)
            where.status = dto.status;
        if (dto.deviationType)
            where.deviationType = dto.deviationType;
        (0, excel_util_1.addDateRange)(where, 'reportedAt', dto.startDate, dto.endDate);
        return where;
    }
    formatDeviationType(type) {
        const map = {
            out_of_range: '超出范围',
            below_min: '低于最小值',
            above_max: '超过最大值',
            invalid_value: '无效值',
        };
        return map[type] || type;
    }
};
exports.DeviationExportService = DeviationExportService;
exports.DeviationExportService = DeviationExportService = __decorate([
    (0, common_1.Injectable)(),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [prisma_service_1.PrismaService])
], DeviationExportService);
//# sourceMappingURL=deviation-export.service.js.map
